N1.type: adjacent curves plus the six four-theta Q_i schemes plus the selected residual node scheme R_keep

N2.type: Cech triple corrections on the Q_i schemes

normalized_incidence_resolution.selection_required: R_keep is the reduced residual node scheme. Its complement in the isolated nodes is normalized.

partial_normalization.required_data: selected reduced isolated nodes and the extension/lift maps; the K-class alone does not determine the derived object

union_terms.type: O_(four theta divisors), length 24 per summand
O_(four theta divisors), Cech triple correction

claim_boundary: The incidence and 10+6 reduction are exact. This handoff does not supply the six mixed Ext^2 values and does not prove the Hodge conjecture.

completion_test.consequence: Together with ker(ev_E) contained in ker(contraction by ch(E)), these six equalities give equality of the two kernels and the weaker criterion in Question 11.4.

execution_strategy.characteristic_zero_provenance: Reduce one fixed integral model at independent good primes; reconstruct from two primes and verify at a third.
execution_strategy.coordinate_model: Use exact theta-coordinate multiplication, restriction, point-evaluation, and normalization matrices.
fiber_checks: Frobenius stability of the selected residual node scheme
execution_strategy.finite_field_selection: p congruent to 1 modulo 12 supplies useful roots of unity but does not by itself make the torsion or theta structure rational.
execution_strategy.global_model: Do not eliminate the 3Theta embedding in P^80; h0(3Theta)=81.
execution_strategy.macaulay2_role: Manage supplied finite matrices, complexes, Hom complexes, Ext reduction, and syzygy certificates rather than global P^80 elimination.
execution_strategy.optional_cyclic_node_choice: If node-level cyclic symmetry is used, choose R_keep as two full free six-element orbits and record them.
execution_strategy.order_six_translation: An exact order-six translation is not automatically a level-3 clock action because the theta group of 3Theta covers X[3]. Use direct_sum_i H0(t_(ig)^*3Theta), with translation permuting the six summands, or use a compatible level-6 theta structure. Neither construction automatically linearizes E.
execution_strategy.shared_totalization: Build and cache one total complex and one Atiyah cocycle; contract all six witnesses against that common data.

hodge_kernel.mixed_status: open: compute each image in Ext^2(E,E)
hodge_kernel.ordinary_status: closed geometrically: extend the polarized abelian scheme, translation sections, relative theta divisors, selected etale node sections, and the relative partial normalization

incidence.selection_boundary: The source specifies only the total number of normalized isolated nodes. The evaluation calculation must supply the selected nodes and the normalization extension maps.

matrix_inputs: equations or transition data for the six translated theta divisors
the Cech restriction maps for all listed intersections
the selected normalized nodes and normalization extension maps
a locally free totalization of [O_X -> nu_*O_Ztilde](3Theta)
the principal-parts Atiyah cocycle of that totalization
compatible bases for HT^2 and Ext^2

parameter_incidence_closure.interpretation: The corrected character, the printed n and r values, and the exact incidence schema agree. This is a separate realization check, not a claim that the printed inputs are logically independent or that an explicit finite-field fiber is already constructed.
parameter_incidence_closure.name: parameter-incidence closure check

preregistered_outcomes.all_six_zero: For this corrected object and recorded node choice, the ten geometric vanishings and six computed vanishings give equality of the evaluation and Chern-contraction kernels. This proves the weaker criterion in Question 11.4 for this object; it does not assert surjectivity.
preregistered_outcomes.any_one_nonzero: For this corrected object and recorded node choice, a nonzero mixed evaluation proves failure of the weaker criterion. It does not cover other residual-node choices unless independence from that choice is also proved.

certificate_forms.nonzero: a dual cocycle ell with ell*D_End=0 and ell(z_ij) nonzero
certificate_forms.zero: an exact End(P) cochain h with D_End(h)=z_ij

preregistered_outcomes.field_scope: An all-zero finite-field result is a result over that field. A complex conclusion requires the fixed-model lift or exact reconstruction.
preregistered_outcomes.integrity_failure: No mathematical verdict: the run did not instantiate the declared object.

symmetry_analysis.inversion_use: Inversion fixes the two-factor mixed classes and does not merge the six mixed witnesses.
symmetry_analysis.translation_use: Use cyclic translations to reuse component and node assembly. Translations act trivially on the HT^2 source and do not merge the six mixed witnesses.
symmetry_analysis.valid_reduction: A reduction requires a proved automorphism with nontrivial linear action on H^1 and a compatible chain-level action. Compute its actual orbits on the six mixed witnesses.

symmetry_boundary: Do not reduce the six mixed checks to one representative unless a chain-level action on this fixed divisor and node configuration is proved.
